query: Find 10 buildings in Trondheim municipality that intersect quick-clay hazard areas with high risk class and are closest to the municipality centroid, sorted by shortest distance first.

1.description: get Trondheim municipality geometry and kommunenummer

2.description: get highest risk class identifier for quick-clay

3.description: get quick-clay hazard areas with high risk class and intersecting Trondheim municipality

5.description: find buildings intersecting high-risk quick-clay hazard areas

7.description: calculate distance from each intersecting building to municipality centroid

8.description: aggregate to one row per building with minimum distance

executions.sql: SELECT kommunenummer, kommunenavn, omrade FROM kommuner_627ee106072240e99d2b21ec4717bf01.kommune WHERE kommunenavn ILIKE '%Trondheim%';
SELECT identifier, description FROM kvikkleire_175185730654415d8841436d0d6999f2.skredrisikokvikkleireklasse ORDER BY identifier::integer DESC LIMIT 1;

SELECT k.omrade FROM kvikkleire_175185730654415d8841436d0d6999f2.kartleggingsomrade k JOIN kvikkleire_175185730654415d8841436d0d6999f2.skredrisiko s ON k.kartleggingsomradeid = s.kartleggingsomradeid WHERE s.risikoklasse = '5' AND k.kartleggingstatus = 'Gjennomført' AND ST_Intersects(k.omrade, (SELECT omrade FROM kommuner_627ee106072240e99d2b21ec4717bf01.kommune WHERE kommunenummer = '5001'));
